## Capabilities
Well log loading: LAS, DLIS formats
QC: curve manifest, provenance, gap detection
Petrophysics: Archie, Indonesia, Simandoux models
Seismic: line loading, 3D volume, horizon picking
Geometry: architectural model building from horizons
Prospect: evaluate, timing, risk scoring, evidence synthesis
Vault: every SEAL verdict chains to VAULT999
